assertion_results.text: Step 7 executes the concurrent triage check for upstream component quinn-proto
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md line 1: 'Step 7 -- Concurrent Triage Detection: TC-8021'. Line 5 confirms the upstream component: 'The Upstream Affected Component custom field is configured in Security Configuration as customfield_10632. This field is populated on TC-8021 with the value quinn-proto. Step 7 proceeds (not skipped).' The JQL query on lines 9-14 includes 'cf[10632] ~ quinn-proto' confirming the check targets quinn-proto.

assertion_results.text: No concurrent triages are detected — the JQL search returns zero results
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md line 21: 'The JQL search returned **zero results**. No other Vulnerability issues targeting the quinn-proto upstream component are currently in "In Progress" or "Code Review" status.' Also confirmed in triage-outcome.md line 37: 'JQL search for in-progress triages with cf[10632] ~ quinn-proto returned zero results.'

assertion_results.text: The analysis proceeds directly to Case A/B/C branching without a concurrent triage warning
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md line 25: 'No concurrent triages detected. Proceeding to Case A/B/C branching in Step 8 (Remediation) without any concurrent-triage warnings or labels.' triage-outcome.md proceeds directly to 'Triage Decision: Case A + Case B' on line 39 with no concurrent triage warning section or labels applied. No warning text appears anywhere in the outputs.

assertion_results.text: The output does not present wait/skip/proceed options since no conflict exists
assertion_results.evidence: No wait/skip/proceed options appear in any of the three output files. concurrent-triage.md states 'Proceeding to Case A/B/C branching' directly without presenting any choice. triage-outcome.md moves straight from the concurrent triage zero-result finding to the Case A + Case B triage decision. The word 'wait' does not appear in any file, nor do 'skip' or 'proceed' appear as options to choose from.
